privileged_info_summary: The task references a real academic publication: 'Natural Law: The Modern Tradition' by Brian H. Bix, published in The Oxford Handbook of Jurisprudence and Philosophy of Law (Oxford University Press, 2002) on pages 61-103. The handbook was edited by Jules Coleman and Scott Shapiro. All metadata claims have been verified against authoritative sources including university directories, academic databases, and publisher records.
